message:
chore(ci): refresh CI gate reports, conformance timestamps, and update beads issue tracker

**CI certification reports (tests/full_suite_gate/):**
- Regenerated certification_verdict.json, certification_report.md,
  certification_events.jsonl, full_suite_verdict.json, full_suite_report.md,
  full_suite_events.jsonl, preflight_verdict.json, waiver_audit.json,
  artifact_retention_report.json with updated timestamps
- PERF-3X bead-to-artifact coverage audit gate promoted from non-blocking
  to blocking (8/9 blocking gates now, up from 7/8)

**Conformance reports (tests/ext_conformance/reports/):**
- CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md and conformance_summary.json regenerated with
  fresh timestamps (no pass/fail changes)

**Cross-platform reports (tests/cross_platform_reports/linux/):**
- platform_events.jsonl, platform_report.json, platform_report.md
  regenerated (all 8 required checks still passing)

**Performance budgets (tests/perf/reports/):**
- PERF_BUDGETS.md, budget_events.jsonl, budget_summary.json regenerated
  with updated timestamps

**Beads issue tracker (.beads/issues.jsonl):**
- Updated with latest task state from concurrent agent work

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
